label: Positive — wants to talk
text: Sure, happy to chat. What times do you have this week?

label: Asks for info
text: Can you send more info and some pricing first?

label: Objection / no time
text: We are way too busy right now, maybe later.

label: Wrong person
text: I do not handle marketing. You should talk to our office manager.

label: Not interested
text: Not interested, we're all set thanks.

label: Out of office
text: I'm out of office on vacation until next Monday.

label: Unsubscribe
text: Please remove me from your list and do not contact me again.
